name: astropy
tagline: Reference skill teaching Astropy APIs for units, coordinates, FITS I/O, tables, time, WCS, and cosmology.
verdict: Clean, transparent reference skill with no malicious patterns: it explicitly warns against elevated-privilege installs and cautions against sending sensitive target/location data to third-party services before making network calls. Minor gaps only: no negative-trigger guidance and no dedicated failure/troubleshooting section, neither of which poses a safety

highlights.summary: No explicit 'do not use when' section (e.g., non-astronomy numeric work, other FITS-adjacent libraries) — a minor omission, not a safety issue.
No dedicated troubleshooting/failure-path section (e.g., what to do on missing IERS data, malformed FITS headers, network timeouts) beyond the general network-access caution.
